'''Sha-Mar Ma-Dred''' was the [[King/Legends|King]] of [[Kashir]]. He had four [[Marriage/Legends|wives]]: [[Tiarri]], [[Kheann]], [[Mirrix]] and [[Ashala Ma-dred|Ashala]]. Shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] the King and his wives traveled to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to meet with the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and discuss Kashir's admittance into the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. King Ma-dred's wives were smitten with the wonders of Coruscant and the King implored [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to help him in reining them in.<ref name="AJM" />
